name: 1980-当代 全球化与数字时代
subject: history
domain_name: Period 8-9 冷战与当代 Cold War & Modern (1945-Present)
curriculum_points:
Unit 6: Learning Objective B
Explain the causes and effects of the settlement of the West from 1877 to 1898.

KC-6.2.I
The expansion of the railroad network and the development of other transportation systems like steamships and canals facilitated the movement of people and goods, connecting the West to eastern markets and promoting economic growth.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「1980-当代 全球化与数字时代」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
